content:
Thanks to a number of LLM's including Gemini,ChatGpt, Copilot, and others for the assist in content writup, proofreading, and styling.

Also thank you to Brittany Chaing for the inspiration. While I dont know Brittany personally, I drew a lot from the site design and flow!

Coded in Visual Studio Code. Built with Preact and Sass, deployed with Github pages. Most text is set in the JetBrains Mono typeface.
